patch.value: PR#605 shipped commitWorkspaceTransaction writing durable journals to <pmRoot>/transactions/sdk/<transactionId>.json (src/sdk/workspace-transaction.ts journalPath). Two hygiene gaps: (1) the init-owned gitignore block lists runtime/, search/, locks/ only, so repos tracking .agents/pm commit journal receipts - churn plus cross-branch conflicts, exactly the artifact class the pm-g5sx wave governs; live checkpoints/ dir is likewise outside the block. (2) Nothing ever prunes journals: committed and compensated receipts accumulate unbounded (checkpoint-gc.ts covers checkpoints only; workspace-transaction.ts is the sole reader/writer of transactions/). Fix direction: extend PM_GITIGNORE_BLOCK plus repo .gitignore (respect pm-4uqm custom-root work), add retention/GC via the existing gc surface, and record the tracked-repo merge disposition on the g5sx family map.
Workspace-transaction journals: .agents/pm/transactions/ outside the init gitignore block with no retention or GC

PM_GITIGNORE_BLOCK (src/sdk/workspace.ts) covers .agents/pm/transactions/, with an explicit recorded decision for .agents/pm/checkpoints/ (checkpoint-gc exists; journals have no GC at all); Documented retention policy plus gc integration prunes committed/compensated journals without breaking transactionId idempotent replay (steps are contract-idempotent, so pruned receipts only cost re-inspection); Merge-safety disposition for repos that track .agents/pm recorded with the pm-g5sx family map (journals are per-branch runtime state and would conflict on every concurrent merge)
